title: Bright Urban Community Intelligence v2
scene_prompt: Cinematic documentary photograph, single continuous frame, no split screen, no diptych, no collage. A vibrant Latin American city boulevard on a bright clear morning. Wide tree-lined avenue with colorful low-rise buildings in warm terracotta, yellow, and white tones lining both sides. Young people walking along clean sidewalks beneath mature shade trees. A well-maintained community park with green grass and benches visible on one side. Modern urban infrastructure subtly embedded — a sleek smart street light pole with small mounted sensor packages, a clean glass bus shelter, fresh crosswalk markings. The entire scene radiates civic pride, safety, and community vitality. Bright golden morning sunlight from the east casting long warm shadows across the avenue and dappled tree shade on the pavement. Clear blue sky above. Shot on 35mm lens, f/4 aperture for deep focus. Kodak Portra 800 film stock. Warm analog color palette — forest green (#0f4c3a) in deep tree canopy shadows, Safety Amber (#F4A261) in warm morning light hitting building facades, hints of Cyber Emerald (#00D1B2) on small sensor status LEDs on the smart pole. Fine organic film grain. Gentle natural vignetting. Editorial documentary quality. The image conveys a thriving community where public safety and wellbeing are the outcome of invisible intelligence. No typography, no logos, no words, no lettering of any kind, no identifiable human faces. Single photograph, not a collage or split image.
palette: forest green (#0f4c3a) shadows + Safety Amber (#F4A261) morning light + Cyber Emerald (#00D1B2) sensor accents
composition: Single continuous frame. Deep avenue perspective creates natural vanishing point. Left side shows buildings and sidewalk life. Right side shows park green space. Open sky for dither overlay.
